title: Employment Proficiencies
description: Information about proficiencies (skills, certifications, and examinations) associated with employment.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the employment proficiency.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the employment proficiency.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the employment proficiency.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the employment proficiency.

licensing.title: Licensing
licensing.description: An indication if a license is required for the employment proficiency.

licensingAuthority.title: Licensing Authority
licensingAuthority.description: The authority that licenses the employment proficiency.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the licensing authority.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Detail.
